mapper.select: select id, repairman_id, repairman_name, repair_type, repair_content, repair_status, create_time, update_time, remark from community_repair where repairman_id = #{repairmanId} and repairman_name like concat('%', #{repairmanName}, '%') order by create_time desc
select id, repairman_id, repairman_name, repair_type, repair_content, repair_status, create_time, update_time, remark from community_repair where repair_id = #{repairId}
mapper.insert: insert into community_repair ( repairman_id, repairman_name, repairman_phone, assign_time, arrive_time, complete_time, repair_cost, cost_desc, repair_result, user_rating, user_feedback, remark ) values ( #{repairmanId}, #{repairmanName}, #{repairmanPhone}, #{assignTime}, #{arriveTime}, #{completeTime}, #{repairCost}, #{costDesc}, #{repairResult}, #{userRating}, #{userFeedback}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: update community_repair set repairman_id = #{repairmanId}, repairman_name = #{repairmanName}, repairman_phone = #{repairmanPhone}, assign_time = #{assignTime}, arrive_time = #{arriveTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, repair_cost = #{repairCost}, cost_desc = #{costDesc}, repair_result = #{repairResult}, user_rating = #{userRating}, user_feedback = #{userFeedback}, remark = #{remark} where repair_id = #{repairId}
mapper.delete: -- delete from community_repair where repair_id = #{repairId} DELETE FROM community_repair WHERE repair_id IN (${repairIds})
